summary: Iteration 66 - 3 Bug Fixes Verified: 1) Homepage hero button restored to 'S'inscrire gratuitement' linking to /register (NOT /farmer/inscription). 2) POST /api/auth/register works for phone-only users (all user types: acheteur, cooperative, fournisseur, producteur, entreprise_rse) without Pydantic validation error. 3) POST /api/ussd/register-web auto-generates code_planteur in format GL-XXX-NNNNN. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: homepage button, /register page, /farmer/inscription form with cooperative_code field and auto-generation note, /cooperative/inscriptions table with Code Planteur column, Agent Terrain inscription form with 'Code cooperative (optionnel)' placeholder.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_models.py: email validator moved from UserBase to UserCreate only - fixes phone-only registration
auth_models.py: clean_empty_email pre-validator converts empty string to None before EmailStr validation
routes/ussd.py: generate_farmer_code() creates GL-{PREFIX}-{SEQUENCE} format using farmer_code_counters collection
routes/ussd.py: PREFIX is first 3 chars of coop_code (if provided) or village, defaults to 'IND' for independent
HeroSection.jsx: Button text is 'S'inscrire gratuitement' with onClick={() => navigate('/register')}
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: cooperative_code field with placeholder 'Optionnel - ex: COOP-DAL'
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: Note says 'Votre code planteur sera genere automatiquement.'
RegisterFarmerPage.jsx: Success page shows code_planteur with data-testid='register-success-farmer-code'
USSDRegistrationsPage.jsx: Table has 'Code Planteur' column showing GL-XXX-NNNNN codes
AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx: Registration form has 'Code cooperative (optionnel)' placeholder
seed_data_creation: Multiple test registrations created during testing with auto-generated codes (GL-GAG-00001, GL-ABE-00001, GL-COO-00003, GL-DAL-00001, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Homepage hero button now says 'S'inscrire gratuitement' and links to /register. 2) auth/register endpoint works for phone-only users (email validator moved to UserCreate only). 3) code_planteur auto-generated in GL-XXX-NNNNN format via generate_farmer_code() in routes/ussd.py. The farmer_code_counters MongoDB collection tracks sequence numbers per prefix. Orange Money and SMS are MOCKED.
